metadata.scheme_name: Educational Award Scheme - Gujarat Labour Welfare Board

raw_data.details: The “Educational Award Scheme” is implemented by the Gujarat Labour Welfare Board, Labour, Skill Development & Employment Department, Government of Gujarat. The scheme has been implemented to encourage the students of the Labours to increase their enthusiasm and to get higher education through it.
raw_data.benefits: Under the scheme, children of laborers who have passed 70% or above marks in the 10th Standard will receive ₹2,500 as an award. The children of laborers who have passed 70% or above marks in the 12th Standard will receive ₹5,000 as an award.
raw_data.eligibility: Only the children (students) whose parents are working in a factory/institute in the state of Gujarat and whose parents have been paying the Labour Welfare Fund will be eligible for this scheme. The children of labourers who have passed 70% and above marks in the 10th or 12th Standard can avail the benefits under the scheme.
raw_data.application_process:
Online
Step 01: The applicant may visit the Sanman Portal: [https://sanman.gujarat.gov.in/](https://sanman.gujarat.gov.in/)
Step 02: On the home page, under the tab ‘Citizen Login’, click on ‘[Please Register Here](https://sanman.gujarat.gov.in/Home/Registration)’.
Step 03: Enter your Aadhaar Card Number, select user type, and then enter Labour Welfare Fund Account Number.
Step 04: Now, click on ‘Fetch’ & verify the details.
Step 05: Enter user details and Password.
Step 06: After successful registration, the applicants can login through their User ID and Password.
Step 07: Now, select the scheme and read the instructions carefully for the selected scheme.
Step 08: Fill out the application form and upload all the relevant documents.
Step 09: Agree with the Rules & Regulations and submit the application form. A confirmation email with the application Number will be sent on the registered email ID.
raw_data.documents_required: Passport-size PhotographID Card of LabourAadhaar Card of LabourLabour Welfare Fund Account NumberRation CardCaste Category certificate, if applicableResidence proofBank account details/Bank PassbookMarksheet of Child/Passing CertificateIdentity proof of Child i.e. Aadhaar CardAny other documents as required
raw_data.scheme_name: Educational Award Scheme - Gujarat Labour Welfare Board

faqs.question: What is the Educational Award Scheme?
faqs.answer: The Educational Award Scheme is an initiative by the Gujarat Labour Welfare Board, Labour, Skill Development & Employment Department, Government of Gujarat, aimed at encouraging the children of laborers to pursue higher education.

faqs.question: Who is eligible to benefit from this scheme?
faqs.answer: Children (students) whose parents work in a factory/institute in the state of Gujarat and have been contributing to the Labour Welfare Fund are eligible for this scheme.

faqs.question: What are the benefits offered under the scheme?
faqs.answer: Under this scheme, students who have secured 70% or above marks in the 10th Standard will receive ₹2,500 as an award, and those who have achieved the same in the 12th Standard will receive ₹5,000 as an award.

faqs.question: How can eligible applicant apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Eligible applicants can apply for the scheme by visiting the Sanman Portal at https://sanman.gujarat.gov.in/.

faqs.question: Can children of laborers from other states apply for this scheme if they are studying in Gujarat?
faqs.answer: No, this scheme is specifically for the children of laborers working in factories/institutes within the state of Gujarat.

faqs.question: Are there any specific documents required for the application process?
faqs.answer: Yes, applicants may be required to provide documents proving their employment in a factory/institute in Gujarat and proof of contribution to the Labour Welfare Fund.
